commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots and restores the per-plugin managed npm project package files and node_modules when managed npm install validation later rejects a candidate, with focused installer regression tests.

PR surface: Source +152, Tests +150. Total +302 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes from source and tests: current main rolls back by uninstall/removal after npm mutation, and the PR test models a blocked security-scan update that must restore the previous project tree. I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
